document_info.prepared_by: David Reinhardt, Vice President, Transportation Insurance Specialists

business_description.nature_of_business: Regional trucking and freight logistics providing LTL and FTL general freight, warehousing, and distribution services across the Midwest and Mid-Atlantic corridor.

coverages_discussed.notes: Coverage provided through OH basic state fund workers' compensation per state statute.
Occurrence form including standard premises/operations and products/completed operations.
Business Auto covering all owned, hired, and non-owned vehicles.
Coverage for all scheduled locations on a special form with replacement cost valuation.
Following form over primary GL, Auto, and Employer's Liability.

positives: Formal business continuity and disaster recovery plan tested annually.
Dedicated safety committee meets monthly and conducts quarterly site audits.
Employee assistance program and workplace wellness initiative have been in place for over five years.
Contractual risk transfer provisions are included in all subcontractor and vendor agreements.
Third-party risk control survey completed within the past 12 months with favorable results.
Formal return-to-work program reduced lost-time claims by over 30%.
All locations have security cameras, sprinklers, and 24/7 monitoring services.
Structured HR program with consistent safety training for 485 employees.
Fleet of 37 vehicles is maintained under a documented preventive maintenance schedule.
concerns: Loss experience reflects a mixed trend with some large individual claims in the review period.
risk_highlights.loss_history_summary: Loss experience reflects a mixed trend with some large individual claims in the review period. Over the review period, the insured incurred 48 total claims with 1378733.13 total paid losses and 1503069.19 total incurred. Currently, 10 claims remain open and 38 have been closed. Average loss ratio is 12.9%. Breakdown by coverage line: Workers' Compensation 24 claims, 826622.56 paid, 888785.06 incurred; General Liability 5 claims, 54126.51 paid, 54126.51 incurred; Commercial Auto 16 claims, 387376.46 paid, 449550.02 incurred; Commercial Property 2 claims, 106691.36 paid, 106691.36 incurred; Umbrella / Excess 0 claims, 0.00 paid, 0.00 incurred; Motor Truck Cargo 1 claim, 3916.24 paid, 3916.24 incurred.

extracted_text_sections.executive_summary: We are pleased to submit Great Lakes Freight Systems, Inc. for your review and consideration. The insured is a regional trucking and freight logistics - LTL and FTL general freight, warehousing and distribution services across the Midwest and Mid-Atlantic corridor, headquartered in Columbus, with approximately 38 years of operating history. Coverage is requested for Workers' Compensation, General Liability, Commercial Auto, Commercial Property, Umbrella / Excess, Motor Truck Cargo.
extracted_text_sections.operations_description: The insured is a regional trucking and freight logistics - LTL and FTL general freight, warehousing and distribution services across the Midwest and Mid-Atlantic corridor, headquartered in Columbus, with approximately 38 years of operating history.
extracted_text_sections.safety_programs: The insured maintains a formal business continuity and disaster recovery plan tested annually; maintains a dedicated safety committee that meets monthly and conducts quarterly site audits; has had an employee assistance program and workplace wellness initiative in place for over five years; carries contractual risk transfer provisions in all subcontractor and vendor agreements; completed a third-party risk control survey within the past 12 months with favorable results; implemented a formal return-to-work program that has reduced lost-time claims by over 30%; equips all locations with security cameras, sprinklers, and 24/7 monitoring services; and maintains its fleet of 37 vehicles under a documented preventive maintenance schedule.
extracted_text_sections.claims_narrative: The loss experience reflects a mixed trend with some large individual claims in the review period. Over the review period, the insured incurred 48 total claims with 1378733.13 in total paid losses and 1503069.19 total incurred. Currently, 10 claims remain open and 38 have been closed. Average loss ratio is 12.9%. Breakdown by coverage line: Workers' Compensation 24 claims, 826622.56 paid, 888785.06 incurred; General Liability 5 claims, 54126.51 paid, 54126.51 incurred; Commercial Auto 16 claims, 387376.46 paid, 449550.02 incurred; Commercial Property 2 claims, 106691.36 paid, 106691.36 incurred; Umbrella / Excess 0 claims, 0.00 paid, 0.00 incurred; Motor Truck Cargo 1 claim, 3916.24 paid, 3916.24 incurred.
